ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_AIVC_UDS_VC_20200709
ddt:Target.Description:
[2]Jul 9th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Aded CF items, based on Rev7.
[1]Jul 3rd, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified CF items, based on Rev6.
[N]Jun 25th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Initial creation, based on Rev5.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: Config.Data_$4036_#004_bit0_Ecall DURATION LED ON AT START

Item.Text: False (callback request by sms is not allowed)(00h)
True (callback request by sms is allowed)(01h)
No retry until next ON cycle(00h)

Data.Name: Config.Data_$408E_#004_bit0_Detect Stop Infringement For Time Limit

Item.Text: R_KeyFob_Inhibition command is not supported by HFM(00h)
R_KeyFob_Inhibition command is supported by HFM(01h)

Item.Text: (TBD)Automatic Emergency Call Systemが正常な状態です。_作業実施は不要です。(00h)
(TBD)Automatic Emergency Call Systemが正常な状態ではないです。_部品交換が必要の為、交換をしてください。(01h)
(TBD)Automatic Emergency Call Systemが正常な状態ではないです。_作業実施をしてください。(02h)
(TBD)エアバッグ展開なしで緊急通報アンロック状態です。_作業実施は不要です。(03h)
(TBD)Automatic Emergency Call Systemが失敗しました。_緊急通報アンロック状態のため作業実施は不要です。(04h)
(TBD)not registered, MS is not currently searching for a new operator(00h)
(TBD)not registered, MS currently searching for a base station(02h)
(TBD)not registered, MS is not currently searching for a new operator(00h)
(TBD)not registered, MS currently searching for a base station(02h)
Cypher key writing only by SDC server (default value)(01h)
Cypher key writing only by diagnostic(02h)

Data.Name: Config.Data_$6000_#011_bit3_DTC Activation Status[RA- Cipher Key Writing failure/RA- Cipher Key not Written]
Config.Data_$6000_#011_bit7_DTC Activation Status[Internal HTTP Server Error]
